input.cmd: /bin/zsh -lc "docker stats --no-stream --format 'table {{.Name}}\\t{{.CPUPerc}}\\t{{.MemUsage}}\\t{{.NetIO}}\\t{{.BlockIO}}' sreft-web sreft-pricing sreft-retry-payments sreft-retry-load sreft-retry-operator"
/bin/zsh -lc 'for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do curl -sS -m 2 -o /dev/null -w "health $i HTTP %{http_code} time %{time_total}'"\\n\" http://localhost:8084/healthz || true; sleep 1; done"
/bin/zsh -lc 'for i in 1 2 3; do curl -sS -m 3 -o /dev/null -w "order $i HTTP %{http_code} time %{time_total}'"\\n\" http://localhost:8084/order || true; done"
